overall.description: A slow cinematic orbit around a modern marble fountain on a luxury residential terrace during golden hour. The scene features contemporary concrete architecture, palm trees, and manicured landscaping, rendered in a game engine with realistic lighting and materials.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential terrace with central water feature

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the central fountain to showcase the terrace architecture and landscaping

entered.detail: large white marble cubic structure with stepped base containing a water feature
small decorative sculpture positioned in the center of the gravel bed
horizontal slatted metal fence separating the terrace from the palm tree line
tall palm trees visible beyond the railing against the skyline
smooth white concrete walls enclosing the terrace space
dense green shrubbery planted along the terrace walls
light-colored stones filling the basin of the fountain around the statue
rocky hillside visible in the background between the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera performs a slow, cinematic orbit around a modern white marble fountain situated on an upscale residential terrace. Golden hour sunlight casts long shadows across the paved surface, illuminating the central water feature and its statue. Palm trees sway gently in the background beyond a metal railing, while manicured hedges line the smooth concrete walls enclosing the space. The scene is devoid of people, emphasizing the tranquil, luxurious architecture and landscaping.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, cinematic orbit around a modern white marble fountain, emphasizing the tranquil luxury of an upscale residential terrace during the golden hour. It begins by circling the central water feature and its statue, where the low sun casts long, dramatic shadows across the paved surface. As the camera continues its smooth rotation, the view expands to reveal manicured hedges lining smooth concrete walls and a metal railing that borders the space. The movement then shifts to capture palm trees swaying gently in the background, further integrating the architectural elements with the surrounding landscape. Finally, the orbit completes its path, highlighting the seamless blend of contemporary materials and serene nature under the warm, golden light.
